research_question: Does test prep completion affect math scores?
rationale: Two independent groups (completed vs none). Welch's t-test robust to unequal variances.
assumptions_checked: Independence, approximate normality (n large), homogeneity checked via Levene's

research_question: Do math scores differ across parental education levels?
rationale: 3+ groups (parental education levels). ANOVA tests omnibus difference in means.
assumptions_checked: Independence, approximate normality (n large), homogeneity via Levene's

research_question: Do gender and test prep interact to affect math scores?
rationale: Examines main effects and interaction of two categorical predictors.
assumptions_checked: Independence, normality of residuals, homogeneity of variance

research_question: Do math scores differ across parental education (non-parametric)?
rationale: Non-parametric alternative to ANOVA when normality questionable.
assumptions_checked: Independence, ordinal data, similar distribution shapes

research_question: Do math scores differ between test prep groups (non-parametric)?
rationale: Non-parametric alternative to t-test when normality questionable.

research_question: Is there a monotonic relationship between reading and writing scores?
rationale: Monotonic relationship without assuming linearity or normality.
